subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who turned unto God, the Ancient King, when most of the peoples turned away from Him, that he may rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم ان اذکر من اقبل الی الله مالک القدم اذ اعرض عنه اکثر الامم لیفرح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude
